description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.9.3 Docker image, caches the node_modules/ directory, and runs npm install as a before_script for every job. Define two jobs in the default test stage: a linting job that executes npm run lint:js, and a tests job that executes npm test. Both jobs inherit the before_script and cache settings, with no additional artifacts, services, or rules.
